info.title: gumcli
info.description: gumcli v2026.3.28.1+efb5ce6692a6d6144b41e7286e93fbcd97fd706b - create projects, check for errors, and generate code.

commands.name: check
commands.description: Check a Gum project for errors.

options.name: --json
options.description: Output errors as a JSON array.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: codegen
commands.description: Generate C# code for a Gum project.

options.name: --element
options.description: Name of a specific element to generate code for. Can be specified multiple times.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: codegen-init
commands.description: Auto-configure code generation settings by locating the nearest .csproj above the .gumx file.

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite existing ProjectCodeSettings.codsj without prompting.

options.name: --csproj
options.description: Explicit path to the .csproj file. When omitted, the nearest .csproj above the .gumx file is used.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: fonts
commands.description: Generate missing bitmap font files for a Gum project.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --template
options.description: Template to use when creating the project. Accepted values: 'forms' (default) includes all Forms controls, behaviors, and assets; 'empty' creates a minimal project with only the standard elements. [default: forms]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: PATH
arguments.description: Path for the new .gumx project file. If no .gumx extension is provided, a project folder and file are created using the given name.

commands.name: screenshot
commands.description: Render a Gum Screen or Component to a PNG file.

options.name: --output
options.description: Path for the output PNG file. Defaults to <element>.png in the current directory.

options.name: --width
options.description: Width of the output image in pixels. Defaults to the project canvas width.

options.name: --height
options.description: Height of the output image in pixels. Defaults to the project canvas height.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: ELEMENT
arguments.description: Name of the Screen or Component to render.

commands.name: svg
commands.description: Render a Gum Screen or Component to an SVG file.

options.name: --output
options.description: Path for the output SVG file. Defaults to <element>.svg in the current directory.

options.name: --width
options.description: Width of the output SVG in pixels. Defaults to the project canvas width.

options.name: --height
options.description: Height of the output SVG in pixels. Defaults to the project canvas height.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: ELEMENT
arguments.description: Name of the Screen or Component to render.

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
